# /test-plan

> Produce the feature `test-plan/` folder. F&O-specific test categories: unit (X++ X++Tests), data-entity validation, integration (service classes / DMF), security-role validation, batch / scheduled job runs, retail-channel (when retail in scope).

## Usage

```
/test-plan [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>]
```

## Inputs

- `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/{f}/spec.md` (`SPEC_APPROVED` APPROVED)
- [templates/test-plan/index.template.md](../../templates/test-plan/index.template.md), [suite.template.md](../../templates/test-plan/suite.template.md)
- `project.config.yaml unitTestPolicy.*`

## Execution flow

1. Group spec FRs into test suites by F&O object-type category (per [constitution/03-object-type-standards.md](../../constitution/03-object-type-standards.md)).
2. Render index + one suite per category.
3. F&O-specific suites include:
   - X++ unit-test class names
   - Data Entity import/export round-trip test data references
   - Security keys / duties / privileges acceptance test
   - Batch job idempotency + restart test
   - Retail channel deployment test (when applicable)
4. Inline self-check + doc_lint.
5. `currentStates += TEST_PLAN_DRAFT`.

## Output

- `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/{f}/test-plan/index.md`
- `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/{f}/test-plan/{suite}.suite.md` (one per category)
